fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source type, such as company, for this entry.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source code that specifies where the entry was created.

fields.name: Base Calendar Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which base calendar was used as the basis.

fields.name: Recurring System
fields.tooltip: Specifies a date or day as a recurring nonworking or working day.

fields.name: Day
fields.tooltip: Specifies the day of the week.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the entry to be applied.

fields.name: Nonworking
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date entry as a nonworking day. You can also remove the check mark to return the status to working day.

fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: There are a number of tables and fields that are not currently documented. There is no specific Help for these tables and fields.
